subcodes.first_line: Is there to be found in all the earth one who hearkeneth unto the Call of God with the ear of justice and equity, and is there to be found one who turneth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل یری فی الارض من یسمع ندآء الله باذن الانصاف و العدل و هل یری من یتوجه الی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
